name: Legacy Gold Mines Ltd.
description: Legacy Gold Mines Ltd. (TSXV: LEGY) is a Canadian-based mineral exploration company focused on the acquisition and development of gold properties. The company is currently engaged in significant exploration activities, including diamond drilling programs at its Baner Gold Mine Property located in Idaho County, Idaho, USA. Headquartered in Calgary, Alberta, Legacy Gold Mines is committed to advancing its projects within the historic Orogrande gold mining district, leveraging strategic exploration to identify and develop high-potential gold resources for its shareholders. The company maintains a professional management team dedicated to operational excellence and transparent corporate governance.
